summary.para: To use this API, you must have one of the following privileges:

item.para: The manage_security cluster privilege (or a greater privilege such as all).
The "Manage Application Privileges" global privilege for the application being referenced in the request.

summary.para: Application names are formed from a prefix, with an optional suffix that conform to the following rules:

item.para: The prefix must begin with a lowercase ASCII letter.
The prefix must contain only ASCII letters or digits.
The prefix must be at least 3 characters long.
If the suffix exists, it must begin with either a dash - or _.
The suffix cannot contain any of the following characters: \, /, *, ?, ", <, >, |, ,, *.
No part of the name can contain whitespace.

summary.para: Privilege names must begin with a lowercase ASCII letter and must contain only ASCII letters and digits along with the characters _, -, and ..
Action names can contain any number of printable ASCII characters and must contain at least one of the following characters: /, *, :.

If true (the default) then refresh the affected shards to make this operation visible to search, if wait_for then wait for a refresh to make this operation visible to search, if false then do nothing with refreshes.
